title: Xtra Garlicky Jamaican Mozzarella Casserole
description: A garlicky, crumbly, comforting Jamaican dish featuring mozzarella balls, served en-croute in a dolsot-stone-bowl, perfect for a low-fat friendly meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a bowl, mix together the jerk seasoning, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Add the mozzarella balls to the bowl and toss to coat with the seasoning mixture.
In a separate bowl, mix together the whole wheat breadcrumbs and olive oil.
Add the breadcrumb mixture to the top of the mozzarella balls in the bowl.
Transfer the mozzarella ball mixture to a dolsot-stone-bowl.
Sprinkle the chopped scallions on top of the mozzarella balls.
Bake the casserole in the preheated oven for 20 minutes.
Remove the casserole from the oven and let it cool for 5 minutes.
Serve the casserole hot, straight from the dolsot-stone-bowl.
